### STDDEV OVER TIME
Similar to [`STD_DEV`](https://www.elastic.co/docs/reference/query-languages/esql/functions-operators/aggregation-functions/std_dev), but it is used to calculate the standard deviation over a time series of values from the given field.

```esql
TS k8s
| STATS max_stddev_cost=MAX(STDDEV_OVER_TIME(network.cost)) BY cluster, time_bucket = TBUCKET(1minute)
```
